title: schizachyrium praematurum
intro: Schizachyrium praematurum, also known as Little Bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Schizachyrium praematurum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Little Bluestem can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
